intent: No NEW source file over 800 lines. Existing God files are grandfathered by the ratchet baseline (HEAD); this stops new ones. Shrinking an existing God file tightens the ratchet.

No test pinned to a frozen git ref/SHA (git diff <ref>..HEAD, --name-only, git show <sha>) — such tests can only rot as HEAD moves past the round. Enforce scope via a round-aware gate, not a permanent product test. (NB: forbid_path coordination/ is intentionally NOT adopted here — coordination/ is Anchor's product domain, unlike a consumer repo where it would be process exhaust.)
